title: Warium
description: A semi-vanilla weapons tech mod which adds Cannons, Guns, Bombs, Rockets, Nukes. and the machinery required to produce them.
body:
Support the Creator:

https://buymeacoffee.com/novum33

Description:

(This mod is still a work in progress and many features are not finished!)

Warium is a Semi-Vanilla styled Warfare Technology mod which adds various weapons from Pistols to Machine Guns, to Artillery cannons, to nuclear explosives.
Warium is very large and has taken a long time to reach this point. The mod has extremely well-made sound design, Particle design, and attention to detail making it one of the most immersive warfare experiences in Minecraft.

![1.1 Cannons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a38a56fc19bf5585fc1556fcd8dc5dd1864cff5.png)
![Explosive Ordinance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/814902b152c2ea7490a5e257c59ca998b7752874.png)

Main Features

Machines and production.
17 Hand weapons.
9 Block Cannons.
Modular Ordinance System for Bombs, Rockets, Torpedoes, and even Nukes.
2 Nuclear Weapons: Fission bomb, and Fusion Bomb.
11 AI Enemies for PVE.
4 Structures.

Mobs:

(Worker: A Lightly armored Quadruped with a Heavy Machine Gun)
(Scout: A flying drone that directs artillery and enemies)
(Decimator: Basically, a walking IFV with a heavy autocannon and a light machine gun.)
(Incinerator: A Decimator with a flamethrower instead of an autocannon)
(Hunter: A flying bicopter drone with a light autocannon and bombs)
(Striker: A bipedal infantry robot armed with a pistol caliber weapon)
(Rifler: A striker with a rifle caliber weapon)
(Commander: A Bipedal infantry bot which scouts targets for other AI)
(Mortarer: A stationary siege cannon that spawns during a machine raid far at the edge)
(CIWS: A defensive rotary cannon turret that shoots aerial players and rockets)
(Eradicator: A terrifying MBT-Like quadrupedal Boss)


Block weapons are fully Compatible (And heavily recommended for) Valkyrian Skies 2!

REQUIRES GECKOLIB.
